files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+name: Notify ACFS checksum monitor
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, master]
+    paths:
+      - 'install.sh'
+      - 'scripts/install.sh'
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  dispatch:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Ensure dispatch token
+        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN == '' }}
+        run: |
+          echo "Missing secret ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN. Add a PAT with repo access for Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup." >&2
+          exit 1
+      - name: Dispatch to ACFS
+        if: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN != '' }}
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.ACFS_REPO_DISPATCH_TOKEN }}
+          repository: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
+          event-type: upstream-changed
+          client-payload: |
+            {"repo":"${{ github.repository }}","ref":"${{ github.ref }}","sha":"${{ github.sha }}","event":"${{ github.event_name }}"}

@@ -39,6 +39,12 @@ declare -A HELPER_CHECKSUMS=(
   ['helpers/type_narrowing_ts.js']='e129ecf4fb0999dd868780a2a67f422a3cc4ecc17866f21a2a27abfa202bf631'
 )
 
+# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+# Capabilities & helpers (must be defined before first use)
+# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+need_cmd(){ command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
+date_iso(){ if [[ "${CI_MODE:-0}" -eq 1 ]]; then date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'; else date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'; fi; }
+
 HELPER_ASSETS=(
   "helpers/resource_lifecycle_py.py"
   "helpers/resource_lifecycle_go.go"
@@ -469,7 +475,7 @@ if [[ "$MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB" -gt 0 && -d "$SOURCE_PROJECT_DIR" ]]; then
   if need_cmd du; then
     # Use du -sm for POSIX-ish systems; fall back to du -sk on others
     # Carefully validate output is numeric before using it
-    local result=""
+    result=""
     result=$(du -sm "$SOURCE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)
     if [[ "$result" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
       dir_size_mb="$result"
@@ -520,12 +526,6 @@ else
   unset UBS_CATEGORY_FILTER
 fi
 
-# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
-# Capabilities & helpers
-# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
-need_cmd(){ command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; }
-date_iso(){ if [[ "$CI_MODE" -eq 1 ]]; then date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'; else date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'; fi; }
-
 ensure_dir(){ mkdir -p "$1" 2>/dev/null || { say "${RED}$X cannot create $1${RESET}"; exit 1; }; }
 
 script_dir(){ local src="${BASH_SOURCE[0]}"; while [ -h "$src" ]; do src="$(readlink "$src")"; done; cd -P "$(dirname "$src")" && pwd; }
